title: FAD - Fabtech Abu Dhabi
content:
Founded in early 2001 as a strategic business unit of the Fabtech International Group, Fabtech Abu Dhabi prides itself on delivering the highest quality fabricated steel products to key authorities and client. Fabtech’s well-planned and cost effective engineering solutions have been the basis for most of our success to date notwithstanding our production processes. The quality of our end product is something our customers depend on and we continue to make this a point of focus relative to continual product improvement. Whether it is a standard product or a custom design we continue to be recognized as the leading resource for all types of specialized structural steel fabrication.
As a specialized fabrication service company we rely on a number of quality suppliers and currently stock over 1,000 tons of various structural steel profiles in our inventory and have access to the most recognized mills and steel brokers across the world.
Our customized fabrication facilities spans over 48,000 square meters with integrated state of the art shot blasting and painting facilities coupled with all kinds of machining facilities. The company can produce an average of 14,000 plus tons of fabricated steel each year and is well equipped with Computer Numerical Controlled (CNC) production line systems.
Our fabrication facilities operate with the following list of equipment. We are constantly upgrading our facilities to suit the requirements of projects.
